extraction.one_line_summary: BONT Dries won from a four-rider breakaway given only 2.5 minutes, as sprinter teams miscalculated the chase on the Muro di Ca' del Poggio.
tactical_patterns: Sprinter teams panicked only when gap was 1:40 with 30km remaining, too late given final categorized climb positioning.
Four-man break deliberately eased effort mid-race after Harry KOSTER drew peloton complaints, preserving energy for decisive final 30km.
LOPEZ Juan Pedro caught in split despite being protected GC rider, exposing Astana's vulnerability on what should be controlled sprint stage.

rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: neutral: suffered mechanical inside final km but gained same time under 3km rule, showing GC protection awareness even on sprint stages
rider_signals.LOPEZ Juan Pedro: negative: caught in split on sprint stage dropping 8th to 9th GC, suggests team unable to position him even on routine stages
rider_signals.KOSTER Harry: negative: chased too hard in breakaway provoking peloton confrontation, poor break politics nearly cost him the stage opportunity
